title: Sequencing Automations
excerpt: Would like to have the ability to set up automations to occur in a dedicated sequence so that they would happen in a specific order, with the ability to STOP the sequence when specific conditions are met

posts.author: deebee (Denise Batista)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to have the ability to set up automations to occur in a dedicated sequence so that they would happen in a specific order, with the ability to STOP the sequence when specific conditions are met
